task.summary: added timer command & Server version check
customized most of the default minecraft commands
teleport particles are no longer shown on bed dismount.
migrated world command to brigadier & commodore is no longer needed
permissions are now registered in run-time
Fixed bug where you could delete folders via the world command
enchant command now supports custom enchantments
Fixed plugin not compatible with eco for certain reasons

refactor(nms): updated nms
Updated nms & paper api again. Also did some code cleanup

MESSAGE.value: enchant command now supports custom enchantments
Fixed plugin not compatible with eco for certain reasons

refactor(nms): updated nms
Updated nms & paper api again. Also did some code cleanup

refactor(nms): NO NMS
Removed nms from project
BREAKING CHANGE: No more nms
feat: Added ChangeSlotCommand.java and fixed AdvancementListener.java to respect the game rules

Update CommandAPI version and add NBTAPI dependency
The update covers changing the CommandAPI version used to 9.4.1 from 9.2.0, and the addition of the NBTAPI plugin as a new dependency. Multiple code adjustments have been made to accommodate the new NBTAPI import, streamline literal arguments, and rearrange import sequences.

Refactor formatting in paper-plugin.yml
Improved readability in the paper-plugin.yml by correcting the indentation of the server dependencies and removing the unnecessary space from the `authors` line. The commit ensures that formatting adheres to set standards.

Updated packetevents dependency to version 2.3.0
The version of "com.github.retrooper.packetevents" dependency has been updated from 2.2.1 to 2.3.0. Also, an additional repository "codemc-releases" has been added in the SurfEssentialsLoader class

Updated packetevents dependency to version 2.3.0
The version of "com.github.retrooper.packetevents" dependency has been updated from 2.2.1 to 2.3.0. Also, an additional repository "codemc-releases" has been added in the SurfEssentialsLoader class.

Update dependencies and adjust code for compatibility
The codebase has been updated to use new versions of dependencies, including a switch from 'commandapi-bukkit-core' to 'commandapi-bukkit-shade' and from 'net.kyori', 'adventure-nbt' to 'com.saicone.rtag', 'rtag' and 'rtag-entity'. Accordingly, parts of the code dealing with these dependencies, especially nbt-related operations in commands, have been adjusted for compatibility with the new libraries. In addition, the list of server dependencies in 'paper-plugin.yml' has been expanded.
